title: Find $$r$$
text: In an expression of the form $$b^{m-1}$$, the base $$b$$ is the common ratio. Here $$r$$ $$=$$ $$4$$.

title: Check |r|
text: Since $$r$$ $$=$$ $$4$$, we have |r| $$=$$ $$4$$ > $$1$$. When |r| $$ \geq $$ $$1$$, the terms grow and the series diverges.

title: Conclusion
text: Because |r| > $$1$$, the infinite geometric series diverges and its sum is not defined.
